summary.en-US: Auto-claim Twitch channel point bonuses, apply optional theme presets, custom accent colors, and chat text scaling.

description.en-US:
Twitch Auto Claim Plus helps tidy up and enhance the Twitch experience.

Features:
- Auto-claim channel point bonus rewards
- Optional Twitch theme presets
- Custom accent color override
- Chat message text scaling
- Quick link to the developer's Discord community

This extension is intended for Twitch pages only.
